prs.title: Report the account and user name in USER.INFO request
[FIXED] Incomplete route pool on premature pong
[FIXED] Avoid stalling read loop on leafnode ErrMinimumVersionRequired
Revert "[FIXED] Hash MQTT clients IDs in server logs"
[FIXED] Hash MQTT clients IDs in server logs
[FIXED] Compressed data coalesced with INFO causing disconnect
[FIXED] PROXY v1 parsing may discard client bytes
[FIXED] Windows Service: LameDuckMode doesn't exit the process
[FIXED] Orphaned check doesn't remove direct consumers
[FIXED] Avoid parsing trace headers from HPUB payload
[FIXED] Incomplete secret redaction in trace logs
[FIXED] Panic on inflight stream and consumer iteration
[FIXED] Stream update loses consumers in async meta snapshot
(2.14) [FIXED] Race condition removing messages for replicated WQ/Interest stream
[FIXED] Skip closed connection register after auth callout timeout
(2.14) Fix panic in filestore on Windows from unsupported directory fsync
Fix MetaClusterInfo.Snapshot not populated in Varz and Statsz responses
[IMPROVED] Always compact, even for non-changed state
[FIXED] Don't encode consumer state in meta snapshot
[FIXED] Prevent stale consumer state losing consumers
Fix nbPool buffer recycling in WebSocket and S2 compression paths
(2.14) Separate info requests into their own JS API queue
memstore: take write lock in memstore.State
Make the deduplication work for sourcing using either the deduplication window
[FIXED] Only use store limits for resources exceeded
(2.14) Fast batch: support clean leader changes
[IMPROVED] R1 Consumer leader process in goroutine
[FIXED] JetStream: Delete consumer may fail with "directory not empty" error
Add Claude Code review to GHA
[FIXED] Scale down/up of consumer monitor race conditions
Allow refusing all client connections with `max_conns: 0`
Fix heap escape of stack array per call in processRoutedMsgArgs and others
memstore: refresh stale Last values and hold write lock in MultiLastSeqs
Add test for flow control with cross-account source fan-out
memstore: use matchLiteral for wildcard checks in loadNextMsgLocked
NRG: Fix cluster size drop to 1 on replaying EntryAddPeer after restart
NRG: Preserve papplied on truncate after unapplied catchup snapshot
[IMPROVED] Eventually force snapshots if blocked due to catchups
[FIXED] Preserve max delivered messages with WorkQueue retention
Fix crasher on callout for a leafnode connection with hand-rolled creds that are mistmatched
memstore: speed up LoadNextMsg when using wildcard filter
Allow optional `window_size` for stream snapshot flow control
Improved flow control for stream snapshots
Don't leak timers when setting up mirrors
(2.12) [FIXED] Remove recovered streams/consumers if not in catchup meta snapshot
[FIXED] Consumer unpin behavior and advisories & added test
[IMPROVED] Include pending msgs/bytes when being unpinned
(2.14) Add sanity checks and tests around removeMsgsInRange
[FIXED] Consumer with overlapping filter subjects but not subset
NRG: Improve membership changes checks & leader is caught-up for forwarded proposals
[FIXED] MQTT: Did not reject Packet Identifier set to 0 for SUB/UNSUB
(2.14) [FIXED] Consistent group rename when moving to or off R1
Consumer inactive threshold cleanup should stop when consumer stops
[IMPROVED] Support HTTP proxy connection from leaf nodes also for TCP
(2.14) reset invalid consumer state to stream state on startup
Fixed incorrectly inverted Overflow check logic
(2.14) Reset consumer to new starting sequence
(2.14) Optimize SyncDeleted so that it purges entire blocks if possible
(2.14?) NRG: WAL must align with snapshot
(2.14) [FIXED] Slow meta changes during fast stream/consumer rescale can desync
[FIXED] Filestore race if rebuild during recovery
[FIXED] Filestore always use tombstone for recovered trailing deletes
Add defer to newFileStoreWithCreated to unlock if needed on exit
(2.14) [CHANGED] Message Tracing: Do not rewrite `traceparent` header
[FIXED] Interest stream desync after consumer filter update
[IMPROVED] Remove no interest messages from head of stream
[IMPROVED] Simplify recalculate pending with updated filter subject(s)
Don't recalculate num pending inline on consumer info
[IMPROVED] Only recalculate pending with updated filter subject(s)
[FIXED] Start time binary search is delete-aware
Fix subject intersection bug due to early return
Fix config parsing with self referencing environment variables
Fixes panic if the stream config is invalid
Fix `HasInterest` early exit on partial wildcard
Don't rebuild subject state in filestore on `noTrack` stores after truncate
[FIXED] JetStream leaks subs with overlapping stream import
Fix a jetStream / jsAccount lock ordering violation
[FIXED] Concurrent map iter/write for WQ stream unique consumer partition
[FIXED] Filestore can't open msg block after single truncated block
[FIXED] Don't delete consumer on concurrent shutdown and leader change
NRG: No repeated votes for same term after stepdown or leader transfer
[FIXED] Panic after hash check and concurrent compact
[FIXED] Consumer with corrupt data file gets deleted automatically
[FIXED] Filestore with encryption may erroneously reset meta.key
(2.14) [FIXED] Repeating schedule on an interval after shutdown
(2.14) [FIXED] Filestore recovers from partial purge after hard kill
[FIXED] Deleted raft node's stream is revived
(2.14) [IMPROVED] Allow disabling dedupe when stream sourcing
Revert "(2.14) [IMPROVED] Make most StreamConfig/ConsumerConfig fields omitempty"
[FIXED] R1 mset.lseq desync when exceeding limits
[IMPROVED] Consumer interest check with large gap
[FIXED] MQTT: QoS2 subscription not getting messages after restart
NRG: Removed leader may reappear in membership
Make sort by monitoring structs public
[FIXED] Filestore idx mismatch & 'no idx present' errors
[CHANGED] MQTT: Permissions to "$MQTT." are now implicit
[IMPROVED] MQTT: Retained msgs handling with cross account and transform
Test and fix Raft peer additions
Expire filestore cache on failed `cacheLookupEx` when `errNoCache`
[FIXED] Websocket: limit buffer size during decompression of a frame
[FIXED] MQTT: Retained message body possibly corrupt in cluster mode
Add WebSocket-specific ping interval configuration option
[FIXED] MQTT: Timing out waiting to load x retained messages
NRG: prevent peer remove of the last peer
Docker nightly: Refactor to use Go toolchain cross-compile
(2.14) [FIXED] Only use store's DiscardNew error for R1 & off-by-ones
NRG: peer removing all followers leaves membership in progress
[FIXED] MQTT: QoS0 msgs across accounts would not be mapped properly
NRG: Leader resurrects removed peers on restarts
Fix subject tracking with filestore secure erase
[FIXED] MQTT: Account mapping was not used when sending JS requests
[FIXED] MQTT: Possible panic with retained messages and config reload
Filestore message remove I/O before accounting
NRG: do not count messages from removed peers towards quorum
Correct per-subject state and schedules when purging message blocks
[FIXED] Panic processing snapshot with nil node/assignment after stream delete
Fix subject tree invalid handling of non-terminating full wildcard
(2.14?) NRG: Don't reset WAL when failing to load last snapshot
[FIXED] Meta peer-remove response after quorum & disallow concurrent changes
[FIXED] JS ack reply protocol error with stream import
fix: ensure mqtt max_payload is enforced and tests are included
[IMPROVED] Stage meta operations during Raft catchup
Improved sourcing first sequence scan with filter-aware walk
Fix deadlock on stream purge when consumer store returns error
(2.12) Add opt-in support for the PROXY protocol
Use concrete highwayhash `Digest64` instead of hash interface
[IMPROVED] Faster meta operations by not fetching accounts if not member
Fix logical race on shutting down clustered JetStream
[IMPROVED] Stream catchup shows up in health check
Add meta snapshot metrics to jsz monitoring
[FIXED] LDM results in max connections exceeded errors
Limit JetStream startup concurrency to same as I/O semaphore
[FIXED] Consumer not found after meta recovery
Reduce allocations in sublist and subject transforms
Add `meta_compact_size` option to further control JetStream meta group compaction/snapshotting
[FIXED] NRG: Quorum reporting after leader stepdown
[IMPROVED] Stream catchup with many deleted messages
NRG: Install leader snapshot on scaleup
Don't snapshot on monitor goroutine or Raft node quit signal unless shutting down
[TEST] Add assert.Unreachable when using legacy JSON stream snapshot
[FIXED] Default to allowing binary stream snapshots
Add `meta_compact` option to control JetStream meta group compaction/snapshotting
[FIXED] Gateway RS+/- blocks on account fetch
[FIXED] NRG: Always only report leader after noop-entry
[FIXED] Consumer send 404 No Messages on EOS
[FIXED] Header search without alloc & bug fixes
(2.12) [FIXED] DirectGet batch deadlock with parallel write
[FIXED] Message Tracing: Hop header set properly per gateway
(2.12) [FIXED] Atomic batch: check correct header for unsupported error
[FIXED] Filestore unlock when message erase fails
[FIXED] Trusted Proxies: Reload log message report added keys as removed
NRG: Parallel catchups can truncate committed
Add `write_deadline` to cluster, leafnode and gateway config
[FIXED] Filestore don't add deletes for empty block with SkipMsgs
[FIXED] Filestore detect delete gap with last SkipMsg
Improve filestore partial cache logging, expire on incorrect sequence, slot check on erase
Add HTTP proxy support for WebSocket leaf node connections
Always use temporary staging for filestore meta file writes
Use optional sync when writing TTL and scheduling state in filestore
feat: add NewServerFromConfig function for embedded server config processing
Fast-path check for empty block on filestore cache lookup
Fix race conditions and potential panics in JS API endpoint meta handling
[IMPROVED] Don't perform meta snapshot on every stream removal
NRG: Replay snapshot upon timeout instead of reset
(2.12) Deactivate message schedule on missing header
(2.12) Use cipher suites from `crypto/tls`, add `allow_insecure_cipher_suites` option
Filestore: Use binary search for sequence-from-timestamp lookups
(2.12) Atomic batch: remove/update debug log lines [skip ci]
[FIXED] Data race on JetStream reserved limits
[FIXED] Fix subject tree intersection to match literals when combined with partial wildcards
[FIXED] Reset clustered state on msg delete EOF
Use stack allocations for filestore hash checks
(2.12) [FIXED] Use correct subject when doing batch check
(2.12) Revert Green Tea GC on goreleaser builds
[CHANGED] Websocket and MQTT: Inhibit TCP Keep Alive
(2.12) Atomic batch: recover compressed batch messages
(2.12) Default persist mode for empty string
(2.12) Atomic batch: reject partial batch on leader change
Set build host in goreleaser to have reproducible rpms
(2.12) [FIXED] Remove msg schedule header in reverse order
(2.12) Atomic batch: correctly track partial batch in same append entry
(2.12) Atomic batch: fix R1 expected last seq
(2.12) Atomic batch: retried batch doesn't reset properly
Prove index build on unexpected sequence, reuse allocations when possible
[FIXED] Restore non-ordered sequences in filestore msg blocks
(2.12) Enable Green Tea GC on goreleaser builds
NRG: Don't send append entry if not leader
Change extended DataStats fields to pointers and export
(2.12) Reuse `perAccountCache` structs when increasing generation or pruning
(2.12) Atomic batch: improve large batch error and advisory
Fixes handling a batched direct get request where the starting sequence number requested is deleted
Correct and simplify stream assignment check
Fix url encoding for ocsp requests
(2.12) Fix `no_hdr` requests on direct get by last subject endpoint
Explains the function of the JSLastSequence message header
Fix internal JS clients disconnecting on account max connection updates
Update to Go 1.25.1/1.24.7, dependencies, GHA workflow dependencies
[IMPROVED] Resync for Mirrors and Sources on LN reconnect in complex topologies
[FIXED] LeafNode: Don't forward shadow sub unsubscribe if spoke leafnode
[FIXED] Infinite wait on shutdown of monitor goroutine
Split TestPSEmulation into memory and CPU tests
[FIXED] LeafNode: Subject propagation with daisy chain and import/export
[ADDED] Assert leader never receives appendEntry for same term
[FIXED] Fix nil pointer dereference in sendDomainLeaderElectAdvisory
[FIXED] NRG: Reject lower term as candidate
[IMPROVED] Enhance JWT validation for scoped users
[ADDED] Add regression test for R3F multileader condition
[FIXED] NRG: New entries from old leader reset WAL during catchup
(2.12) Revert to meta leader proposing consumer remaps
(2.12) Add `isolate_leafnode_interest` for suppressing east-west leafnode interest propagation
(2.12) Add trace logging for msg delivery
Comment some uncommented structs and some comment fixes
(2.12) Log connection details and auth info from clients
[FIXED] Mark monitorWg as done if goroutine not started
[FIXED] Handle consumer replica size config drift
[FIXED] Hold consumer lock when reading o.cfg.PauseUntil
[FIXED] Route: Infinite retry cluster connection with invalid credentials
Add `"leader_since"` to stream and consumer info response
(2.12) Elastic pointers in the filestore write-through cache
(2.12) [IMPROVED] Don't log empty internal client ID
Fix account JWT updates disconnecting oldest connections
[FIXED] Correct Nats-TTL header if SDM TTL overrides it
(2.12) [IMPROVED] Add account and user to client log
(2.12) [ADD] no responders return the original subject
(2.12) [FIXED] Pedantic stream/consumer config validation & max_ack_pending -1 default
(2.12) Add required API level in JS requests
[FIXED] Ephemeral consumers always selects an online server
[FIXED] Truncate to removed block & hard kill recovery
(2.12) Update to Go 1.25 for releases, Go 1.24 minimum, update golangci-lint, dependencies
(2.12) Add Prioritized to the Consumer Priority Modes
NRG: Success signaling & stepdown during catchup
[FIXED] Loading block error when recovering TTL
(2.12) [IMPROVED] Always handle JS API requests from pool
[FIXED] Detect removed blocks with stale index.db
(2.12) [FIXED] Leaf node without auth doesn't default to global account
(2.12) Don't propose deletion of failed consumer assignment
(2.12) Atomic batch: support expected last subject consistency checks
[IMPROVED] NRG: remove StreamState usage in n.Applied and n.Size & async flush compacted tombstones
(2.12) Atomic batch: limits & cleanup after timeout
[IMPROVED] Mark consumer active before processing acks
[FIXED] Cipher conversion fails on compressed msg block
[IMPROVED] CI: Check PR sign-offs with env variable
[IMPROVED] First stab at documenting varz and related structures
[FIXED] NRG: Don't compact on catchup until snapshot written
[FIXED] NRG: Fix server shutdown race condition
[TEST] Update `BenchmarkJetStreamConsumeFilteredContiguous` to test both single-filter & multi-filter
[FIXED] Fix lack of check for priority groups on push consumers
[CHANGED] add endpoint names to monitoring overivew page
[FIXED] Ensure `$SYS.REQ.USER.INFO` is only answered by correct server
[FIXED] NRG: Truncate back to snapshot properly
[CHANGED] Make monitoring overview page aesthetically more pleasant
(2.12) Stream leader should propose consumer remaps once assignment processed
[FIXED] No redundant limit marker on KV purge
(2.12) [IMPROVED] Randomly set rg.Preferred to online node
(2.12) Include original subject in `Nats-Stream-Source`, use in counter sourcing map
(2.12) Add `no_hdr` support to message get and direct get
(2.12) Allow replicated stream creation with offline nodes
[FIXED] Get header value with shared prefix
(2.12) Atomic batch: remove batch headers on source/mirror
[FIXED] Pull consumer AckWait signals still active
(2.12) Exponential backoff on route/gateway reconnection attempts
(2.12) Generate connect and disconnect events for global account clients
[IMPROVED] Optimise consumers with simple generic sublist, intersection in `NumPending`
[FIXED] Healthz "monitor goroutine not running" after stream restore
Do not respond on exceeding `MaxWaiting` limit when heartbeat interval specified
[FIXED] Report memory usage correctly on Linux with huge pages
[FIXED] Fix `DeliverLastPerSubject` consumer policy with interior deletes
[IMPROVED] Don't log R1 ephemerals in clustered environments
[FIXED] NRG: Monotonic heartbeat and quorum tracking
[FIXED] Propagate stream interest policy changes to consumers in all cases
NRG: Fix integer overflow on 32-bit platforms
[FIXED] Data race on copy stream metadata
[IMPROVED] Speed up a mirror or source consumer's resync across leafnode connections.
NRG: Improve docs & fix ae response leak
NRG: Only allow highest known term for catchup
[FIXED] Replicated consumer's messages are returned after NoWait's request timeout
(2.12) NRG: Don't respond success to catchup messages & ignore response if not leader
[IMPROVED] Added in additional tests and one minor bug fix
[FIXED] Desync after partial catchup from old leader
[ADDED] Protocol: INFO in response to CONNECT contains account info.
[IMPROVED] Move the access time service to its own package and ensure go routine cleanup.
[IMPROVED] NRG: Clarify log when resetting WAL
Update CI to test Windows Server LTSC2022/2025 builds
Fix lock contention issue when reporting stream ingest warnings
Don't hold `clsMu` while purging stream consumers
[FIXED] LeafNode: Unable to reply if origin originates from super-cluster
Correctly handle updates to `AllowMsgTTL` on streams
(v2.12?) [ADD] allow stream placement to evict servers
[FIXED] Potential panic if subject to delete shorter then interior node index and prefix.
(2.11) [ADDED] LeafNode: Support for TLS handshake_first duration
Add support for DefaultSentinel for fallback JWT handling
[FIXED] workqueue reset to 0 when blk file is zero-sized due to unflushed data on crash
[FIXED] Gateway: TLS configuration reload now applies to implicit remotes
TLS: Include subject name and SHA-256 fingerprint in handshake error log lines where possible
[FIXED] Don't report redeliveries for consumer with MaxDeliver 1
Update to Go 1.24.3, set minimum to 1.23.9
Print "Trapped %q signal" as Notice level message
